element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Essential for defeating enemies and progressing
Opens vertical navigation and secret areas
Collection threshold increases as game progresses; gates level progression
Avoidance becomes critical in mid-to-late game
Optional challenge for continues; requires collecting specific hidden letters
Humorous visual feedback system for damage accumulation
Breaks levels into segments; provides respawn points

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Steady escalation with level-based relief points; time limits create constant low-level tension; collection requirements ramp progressively

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden letters spelling UNCOLA in Bonus Stages signal optional collectible content
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Climbable surfaces (accessed via jump-cling mechanic) lead to secret areas and hidden letters

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to jump, attack, and climb mechanics in safe contexts; low Spot collection thresholds
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased Spot collection requirements; more complex enemy placements; mixed platforming and combat challenges
difficulty_curve.late_game: High collection quotas; dense enemy encounters; time pressure becomes more critical; advanced platforming with clinging mechanics
notable_spikes: First introduction of multiple enemy projectiles
Significant jumps in Spot collection quotas between levels
Bonus Stage difficulty (optional but gated by collection performance)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level requires collection of progressively higher Spot counts to unlock cage rescue and progress; creates resource pressure throughout level
Flagpole checkpoints divide levels into digestible sections, breaking tension cycles and allowing respawn management
Successful level completion grants access to optional Bonus Stage; UNCOLA letters hidden within provide Continue resources; incentivizes thorough exploration
Climbable surfaces enable upward navigation and secret area access; rewards mastery of climb mechanic with hidden content
